message:
fix(runtime): replace try_lock I/O leader pattern with atomic CAS polling

Add IoDriverHandle::try_turn_with() which uses an AtomicBool CAS to
ensure exactly one thread polls the reactor, eliminating mutex
contention on the I/O driver. Rewrite the three_lane scheduler PHASE 5
to compute deadline-aware I/O timeouts from timer, local, and global
queues, and replace the 1ms spin-park with indefinite parking for
follower threads. This reduces idle CPU usage and improves I/O latency
under contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
